message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state

Synchronizes the local beads issue tracker with completed work:

- bd-3e1t.1.5: Conformal predictor for frame-time bounds
- bd-3e1t.1.6: Add full vs dirty diff benchmarks

- bd-3e1t.2: VOI telemetry epic (complete)

Updated metadata:
- Completion timestamps
- Resolution notes with commit references
- Dependency graph cleanup

The beads tracker provides local-first issue management for AI agent
workflows, enabling systematic progress tracking across sessions.
